programs.title: Escape To The Country
programs.desc: Surrounded by concrete and noisy traffic, most city people are tempted to quit the rat-race for the peace of the countryside. In this series, experts Jules Hudson, Alistair Appleton, Aled Jones and Denise Nurse help people to achieve that dream, finding property with potential and guiding prospective buyers through every aspect of buying, selling and moving.

programs.title: Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Join Natasha Raskin Sharp from Worcester. The teams battle it out with expert help from Thomas Forrester and Tim Weeks before heading to the auction in Staffordshire. Natasha also visits a rare collection of Traveller caravans.

programs.title: Call The Midwife
programs.desc: A spate of violent attacks on women brings a state of fear to Poplar. A secret pregnancy threatens the life of a young girl after her mother takes matters into her own hands.

programs.title: Inspector Morse: The Dead Of Jericho
programs.desc: Morse investigates five ruthless, gruesome killings in and around a quiet country church with the help of the church cleaner, to whom he becomes attracted.

programs.title: Showtrial
programs.desc: Cleo puts pressure on the police case as Talitha threatens to slip from Cassidy's grasp, but a surprise arrest of a third suspect offers a new theory about what happened to Hannah.
